mapper.select: SELECT settlement_month AS month, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(amount) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS settled, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS unsettled FROM u_earnings_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY settlement_month ORDER BY settlement_month DESC
